V1.0.0.description:
**Sternly Worded Peninsula v1.0.0**
The first public release of Sternly Worded Peninsula, adding Archipelago support for Sternly Worded Adventures.

**Features**
- Full Archipelago Multiworld support.
- New Wayfarer class built around a custom item; the Nexus Satchel.
- Archipelago checks replace loot from supported location types.
- Node Access progression gates overworld travel.
- Full playthrough support from game start through defeating the Anomaly.

**Known limitations**
This is an initial release and there are still a number of limitations:
- Not every possible reward location has been integrated into Archipelago yet.
- The Nexus Satchel currently draws from the full eligible item pool, so it may offer weaker/uncombined items, curses, or duplicates.
- The overall item pool is currently fairly small, containing only Hearts, Gear Slots, Nexus Charges, Node Access, and the filler Gold.

**Planned improvements**
Some ideas planned for future releases include:

- Additional checks for shops, tombs, and other location types.
- Smarter Nexus Satchel item selection (avoiding duplicates, inferior upgrades, curses, etc.).
- More items in the Archipelago item pool, like potions, scrolls, etc.
V1.0.0.title: Sternly Worded Peninsula V1.0.0

V1.0.1.description:
**Sternly Worded Peninsula v1.0.1**
An intermediary patch to address a few of the issues in the initial release alongside introducing a few of the improvements as promised with the initial release.

**Changelog**
- Fixed several issues with the apconfig.lua file that weren't properly accounted/tested for.
- Increased variety in the filler checks to now include various potions and scrolls (as opposed to only 50 gold for each).
- Massively limited the pool of items in the Nexus Satchel; it no longer gives curses, board-altering passives, duplicate items on a single run, etc.
- Fixed a few issues in the code that could return errors and some instances of redundancy.
- Fixed some locations (like Bandit Camps and Spider Forests) not giving their respective checks when corrupted.

**Planned improvements**
- Additional checks for shops and other location types or actions.
- A few options in the .apworld to alter world generation (like potentially removing Lost Woods nodes for example).
V1.0.1.title: Sternly Worded Peninsula V1.0.1
